name: starlight-agent-canvas
description: OSS-first, MCP-native research and workflow canvas for agents, creators, and Starlight systems.

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @starlight-agent-canvas/core build && pnpm --filter @starlight-agent-canvas/mcp build && pnpm --filter @starlight-agent-canvas/web build
scripts.test: pnpm --filter @starlight-agent-canvas/core test && pnpm --filter @starlight-agent-canvas/core build && pnpm --filter @starlight-agent-canvas/mcp test
scripts.verify: pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build
